phase.title: Foundation
phase.goal: Repo, RepoPlanner submodule, `.planning/` contract, pushed to `main`.

phase.title: Product & workflow planning
phase.goal: PRD, CRM/integration strategy, workflow docs, architecture notes (Payload + Supabase + Vercel).

phase.title: Landing & Payload scaffold
phase.goal: Payload website baseline plus seeded public marketing site, proof content, and quick-edit content paths for launch pages.

phase.title: Supabase + team access
phase.goal: Wire Postgres to Supabase; env for prod/dev; seed users bg@ / pb@ / de@ grimetime.local; auth verified.

phase.title: Customers, forms & ops integrations
phase.goal: Lead forms, Payload-native CRM lifecycle, scheduling, Resend follow-up, and Stripe billing handoff for quote-driven follow-up.

phase.title: Quoting & advanced ops
phase.goal: Quoting system; internal dashboard with real business targets; growth playbook; phased equipment/tool guidance; optional in-app credential vault if approved after security design.

phase.title: First-party CRM, billing, and automation
phase.goal: Replace the old third-party CRM mental model with a Payload-native CRM workspace, Stripe webhook billing sync, and Payload-jobs-driven Resend sequences that power compact admin and customer account surfaces.

doc-flow.doc: Phase folders aligned with this roadmap.
